gates.name: Poly Haven CC0 mesh kit
gates.summary: 2 CC0 mesh source asset(s), 13 world placement(s), 2 WebGL preview mesh group(s).
gates.nextAction: Use these as kitbash dressing while Houdini/ZBrush hero meshes continue to own the primary silhouettes.

gates.name: CC0 terrain PBR fallback
gates.summary: 4 complete CC0 terrain PBR source set(s) found, 4 Unity mask map(s) generated.
gates.nextAction: Keep this as the terrain-material fallback until/if a paid Substance or scan library pass replaces it.

gates.name: Substance PBR texture sets
gates.summary: No complete BaseColor/Normal/MaskMap set found yet.
gates.nextAction: Install Substance Painter through Creative Cloud or export PBR sets from another licensed Substance install.

gates.name: Unity integration scene
gates.summary: Unity scene has 31 stream cell(s), 13 CC0 kitbash cell(s), 4 terrain layer(s), 4 terrain PBR set(s), 2 foliage prototype(s), 166629 mask-painted detail instance(s), 1 cave opening(s), 3249 terrain hole pixel(s), and terrain imported=True.
gates.nextAction: Rebuild Unity after every external terrain, Houdini, ZBrush, or Substance export.
